steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to provide a concrete example of a specific position in Cecchetti method ballet. The notes identify third position as that example, so the answer must name it and link it to the Cecchetti method.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In dance, some positions are for the dancer's arms.: mentions positions without naming the specific Cecchetti example. ✗
  • Choice B — Cecchetti method ballet includes several dance positions for the dancer's arms.: brings up Cecchetti method but fails to name a concrete position. ✗
  • Choice C — Third position is an example of a position in Cecchetti method ballet.: directly states that third position is an example of a position in Cecchetti method ballet. ✓
  • Choice D — Body positions are an important part of dance, including Cecchetti method ballet.: discusses the method generally without delivering the required specific example. ✗
That is the correct answer.
